name: io.github.codespar/mcp-picpay
description: MCP server for PicPay Business — Brazilian digital wallet with 60M+ users. Merchant checkout API, Pix QR, refunds, cancellations, and recurring subscriptions.

environmentVariables.name: PICPAY_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: PicPay merchant integration token (sent as x-picpay-token header)

environmentVariables.name: PICPAY_SELLER_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: PicPay seller token used to validate webhook callbacks (x-seller-token header)

environmentVariables.name: PICPAY_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: PicPay ecommerce API base URL. Defaults to https://appws.picpay.com/ecommerce/public.
